name: O.R.C. Whipper Earwig
description: The O.R.C. Whipper Earwig is the controlled version of the garden's most versatile earwig. It keeps the tail sweeps, thrown stones, and awkward spacing pressure of the base species, but links them together far more aggressively.
behavior: It moves much more than the pincher variant and constantly alternates the tail with frontal attacks so you never settle into a safe rhythm.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and becomes especially annoying when you try to play at mid-range. If you do not shut it down quickly, it forces constant blocking, movement, and repositioning.
interactionWithCreatures: Inside O.R.C. groups it usually stays one step behind the front line, using the tail and rocks to cover spaces other units cannot reach.
strategy: It is still weak to sour. Do not sit comfortably behind it or at mid-range; punish the rock throw and step in right after the tail sweep ends.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 3-Hit Combo: 68.75. 5-Hit Combo: 68.75. Charged Pinch: 112.5. Tail Whip: 68.75. Rock Throw: 87.5.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A three-hit series with very little downtime between swings.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A long sequence that keeps pressure going unless you break the rhythm.

abilities.name: Charged Pinch
abilities.description: A heavy pinch attack that punishes weak defense.

abilities.name: Tail Whip
abilities.description: A rear sweep used to cover targets outside the front arc.

abilities.name: Rock Throw
abilities.description: A ranged throw used to force movement and break your rhythm.
